rationale: Motor vehicle collision with a totaled vehicle and the policyholder sustaining minor injuries (whiplash and sprained wrist).
claim_summary: Pat Morgan (POL-1003) was rear-ended on Route 9 while stopped at a red light by a vehicle traveling 35 mph with no braking. The vehicle is totaled with severe trunk and rear-seat damage. The claimant sustained whiplash and a sprained wrist. Police report filed with other driver's insurance information included.

case_facts.description: rear-ended by other driver traveling 35 mph with no braking
case_facts.vehicle_damage: totaled; entire trunk crushed into back seat
